hooks.command: grep -q '"stop_hook_active"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*true' && exit 0; w="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/${user_config.wiki_root}"; [ -f "$w/hot.md" ] || exit 0; changed=$(find "$w" -name '*.md' ! -name 'hot.md' -newer "$w/hot.md" 2>/dev/null | head -5); [ -n "$changed" ] || exit 0; echo "Wiki pages changed after hot.md was last rewritten: $(echo "$changed" | tr '\n' ' ')— rewrite $w/hot.md (~500 words, preserving its existing section shape) before stopping." >&2; exit 2
